title: cineraria sonchifolia
intro: Cineraria sonchifolia, also known as bird's eye or Mexican marigold, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cineraria sonchifolia include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an anti-parasitic agent. Cineraria sonchifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
